remaining_tasks.name: Fix code-review findings (1 BLOCKER + 4 WARNING; INFO optional)
Complete 5-item perceptual UAT on real devices

blockers.description: CR-01 (BLOCKER): theme.css :87-93 reduced-motion rule sets `transform: none !important` which silently overrides BreathingShape's inline `transform: scale(0.79)`. Real users with prefers-reduced-motion: reduce see orb at full 1.0 scale, not D-06 mid-scale. Test passes only because it asserts `style.transform` (inline) not computed style. Fix: drop `transform: none !important`, keep `transition: none !important`.
WR-01: App.tsx modal stays open if timed session auto-completes while dialog is showing — no effect syncs endDialogOpen with state.status transitions away from running
blockers.workaround: add useEffect that closes dialog when status !== running

blockers.description: WR-02: EndSessionDialog rebinds `cancel` listener on every parent render because App recreates confirmEnd/cancelEnd each render (no useCallback). Hundreds of addEventListener/removeEventListener per second during running session.
blockers.workaround: wrap App's confirmEnd/cancelEnd in useCallback OR move listener-binding into stable ref pattern

blockers.description: WR-03: Inner reference ring in BreathingShape.tsx:44-52 has no inset/top/left — centering relies on grid auto-positioning of an absolutely-positioned child (browser-dependent, untested)
blockers.workaround: add explicit inset-0 + margin: auto OR remove `absolute` and let grid place it

blockers.description: WR-04: SessionReadout outer <section> and inner <div role=status> both carry aria-label='Session readout' — screen readers announce twice on entry
blockers.workaround: drop one of the two aria-labels

human_actions_pending.action: Run 5-item perceptual UAT on real devices (iPhone SE / mid-Android + Chrome/Safari/iOS Safari)

context_notes: Phase 2 plans 4/4 complete and merged on main. Tests 78/78 green, tsc clean, build clean. Verifier returned status=human_needed (24/24 automated must-haves passed; 5 perceptual UAT items pending). Code reviewer found 1 BLOCKER + 4 WARNING + 4 INFO. The BLOCKER (CR-01) is real — reduced-motion users see wrong orb size. The phase is technically complete but should NOT be marked Complete in ROADMAP until CR-01 is fixed and HUMAN-UAT is signed. STATE.md still says status=executing; ROADMAP plan_count=4/summary_count=4/status=Complete (set by SDK after wave 3) but real phase-level Complete gate is verification + UAT.
